name: Pro-ASI Movement
text1: An online movement advocating unrestricted ASI development gained a large following. Members include researchers at declared labs who argue the treaty holds back beneficial AI.
text2: Pro-ASI activists infiltrated a declared lab's safety team. Internal safety evaluations were systematically weakened. The lab's latest model was far more capable than reported to inspectors.
image-prompt: A crowded tech conference with a charismatic speaker on stage, audience members wearing accelerationist symbols, glowing screens showing ASI propaganda, cult-like fervor mixed with Silicon Valley aesthetics, digital painting, no text
